_comment: JMS/JMR unity+-1%/2% comparison reskim (2026-07-22). Identical running conditions to the arc_r2 minimal production; the physics change is corrections.py jmssf/jmrsf ported to the UL SoftDropJMSJMRULRun2 unity tables (old per-year values kept as comments there). minimal_syst = nominal + JER/JMS/JMR up/down: enough to compare the nominal response shift and the JMS/JMR bands against arc_r2 without the 87-systematic cost. Stage outputs into unfold/inputs/zjet/rho/jmsjmr_unity/ -- filenames collide with the arc_r2 pkls.
